title: Hardys 15m Washing Line Rope | Strong & Long Clothes Line Rope with Steel Core & PVC Coating | For Indoor, Outdoor & Camping | Rot, Mould & Weather Resistant | White
features: 𝐇𝐄𝐀𝐕𝐘 𝐃𝐔𝐓𝐘 𝐖𝐀𝐒𝐇𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐄 - Presenting a medical grade PVC coated washing line with steel core, available in 15m and 25m lengths ensuring durability and flexibility. It can bear up to 80kg weight, perfect for sorting large laundry and washing loads.

𝐅𝐋𝐄𝐗𝐈𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐄 - Flexible enough for both indoor and outdoor use. It is easily tethered to hooks, a clothes prop or a washing line pole. Its adaptability makes it a great indoor washing line, and as a retractable washing line it's simply rolled up and stored.

𝐖𝐄𝐀𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐑 𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓 - Built with a medical grade PVC coating, our clothes line is resistant to weather, mould, and rot, guaranteeing longevity in all outdoor conditions, an ideal outdoor clothes dryer that takes less space than a rotary washing line.

𝐂𝐎𝐋𝐎𝐔𝐑𝐅𝐔𝐋 𝐂𝐋𝐎𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐒 𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐄𝐒 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐎𝐔𝐓𝐒𝐈𝐃𝐄 - Multiple colours - blue, green, grey, white - to match your aesthetic preference while serving as a practical clothes lines for outside, bringing some colour to your clothes props or washing line outside.

𝐏𝐎𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 𝐖𝐀𝐒𝐇𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐄 - Incredibly robust and versatile, whether you're using it indoor or outdoor, it's portable and easily tied off to a washing post or clothes line prop. It can span gardens with ease and makes a perfect camping washing line.
description: Product Description Why choose Hardys Steel Core Washing Line? Built to commercial-grade standards, this premium line offers superior strength and durability compared to typical household options, elevating the home laundry experience. What is the line made of? The line features a durable medical-grade PVC coating that shields the high-tensile steel core, providing unparalleled strength and weather resistance for long-lasting use. How much weight can it hold? Rated to support up to 80kg, this premium washing line is engineered to effortlessly handle bulky comforters, heavy fabrics, and overflowing laundry loads with ease. What length options are available? Available in 15m, 25m, and 50m lengths, this versatile line can be tailored to fit a variety of outdoor drying spaces, from small balconies to large backyards. How does it handle outdoor conditions? The protective PVC coating shields the line from sun damage, rain, and other harsh weather, ensuring reliable, long-lasting performance season after season.
